name: Praline Ice Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt butter in a 3-quart saucepan; remove from heat.
3. Add ice cream, eggs, flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and graham cracker crumbs. Mix until smooth.
4. Pour mixture into a greased 13x9 inch pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
6. Combine sour cream and caramel topping; pour over warm cake.
7. Sprinkle top with chopped pecans.
8. Cool; cut into squares.
9. May be served with ice cream or whipped cream. This cake is very rich.
